titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 588

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=840 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 15:48:09.509896+00 | translation moa=841 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 15:48:09.522075+00

p.cl:
. W . dei gratia Rex Scott’ vicecomiti suo de Berewic et omnibus probis hominibus
suis de Laodonia et de Merkes . Salutem .

concessisse . [left blank] . Prior de
Coldingham quod remoueat homines suos de Coldinghamschiria ad uillam de Coldingham
hospitandam quos de iure remouere poterit . Quare prohibeo firmiter nequis predictum
priorem iniuste disturbet omnes illos remouere ad prefatam uillam hospitandam  quos
de iure remouere poterit et debebit .

Testibus Hugone Cancellario meo . Ricardo de Prebenda
clerico meo
William, by the grace of God king of the Scots, to his sheriff of Berwick and all his worthy men of Lothian and of the Merse, greeting.

me to have conceded to [blank] Prior of Coldingham that he may remove his men of Coldinghamshire to inhabit the toun of Coldingham, whom in law he shall be able to remove. Wherefore I strictly forbid that anyone unlawfully hinder the aforesaid prior from removing all those whom in law he shall be able and is entitled to remove in order to inhabit the aforementioned toun.
As witnesses: Hugh, my chancellor; Richard de Prebenda, my clerk.
At Selkirk, on the 17th day of July.
